data.body:
COMPLETED — both jira-pressure-test probes fully de-staled, corrected, and green on baseline AND HEAD with identical parity.

Commits: d8c1bda9 (field probe), e6283484 (lighter probe).

Field probe (e2e_field_validation_probe.sh): 167 passed / 0 failed on baseline (19f6dea5) and HEAD. Fixes: CLI ticket-prefix, mktemp BSD portability, all inbound assertions rewritten to the documented conflict_resolver FIELD_CLASSES policy (state=local-wins, additive=merge, set=union-add-only), Phase 3a positive+negative inbound controls, Phase 6a eventual-idempotency, and a clear FIELD SYNC MATRIX (per-field Class + Create/Update-out/Update-in + legend) with CRUD coverage.

Lighter probe (e2e_validation_probe.sh): 25 passed / 0 failed on baseline and HEAD. Fixes: CLI ticket-prefix, --filter-local-ids scoping (was unsafe unfiltered bootstrap-strict), awk mutation-count (BSD grep -P removed), CLI-based local edit (was direct ticket.json file write — store is event-sourced), settle-then-assert idempotency.

All root causes were pre-existing staleness (CLI drift, macOS portability, event-sourcing migration, eventual-consistency) — none related to the acli split, which both probes confirm preserved Jira-sync behavior through the full reconcile pipeline (identical baseline=HEAD). No DIG/local orphans left.
